required_gates.reason: Trusted consent and revocation UI must exist before broader private retention.
Intake safety must exist before non-synthetic broader-domain bodies.
Domain policy enforcement must be active before broader-domain storage.
Candidate payload facets must be enforced before broader-domain storage.
Exact-artifact consent must exist before public candidate conversion.
Public search and publication gates must pass before serving public candidates.
Intake safety must pass before non-synthetic public candidates.
Reviewer publish workflow must exist before public conversion.
Public candidate gate must pass before respondent inquiry.
Negative tests must prove respondent surfaces cannot expose identity or raw source material.
Respondent inquiry policy must define allowed redacted responses.
Moderation, reporting, correction, and takedown workflow must exist.
Abuse identity lane scaffold must be accepted before real enforcement.
Trust-and-safety audit gate must be accepted before real identity processing.
Actor role model must be accepted before any real enforcement actor can operate.
High-risk and two-person review policy must exist before bans affect outputs.
Idempotent write-before-effect controls must exist before real enforcement.
Generic response and no-match-disclosure controls must exist before identity checks.
Identity minimization policy must exist before real identity signals are collected.
Protected fingerprint profile must exist before identity matching.
Durable audit write-before-effect path must exist before real enforcement.
Negative tests must prove respondent/dashboard surfaces cannot disclose identity state.
Raw identity retention, access audit, and purge policy must exist before any raw identity escrow.
Appeal and mistaken-identity recovery must exist before bans affect outputs.
Exact intake-review escrow consent must exist before raw detail escrow.
Intake safety must pass before any ambiguous raw body can enter escrow.
Protected-data durability must exist before encrypted raw detail storage.
Expiry and withdrawal must purge raw escrow content.
Raw escrow TTL policy must exist before any raw body can enter escrow.
Reviewer access lease and step-up policy must exist before raw review.
Negative tests must prove raw detail cannot echo into model, audit, client, B2B, or dashboard output.
Escrow key profile must be accepted before encrypted raw detail storage.
Raw detail purpose-binding policy must prohibit public, B2B, respondent, and training release.
AEAD envelope, key wrapping, nonce, and AAD binding profile must be accepted.
Reviewer lease, TTL, step-up, and copy/export policy must be accepted.
Backup purge and restore quarantine policy must be accepted.
Audit and client responses must be digest-only before raw escrow exists.
Aggregate signal policy must define source-count, freshness, and manipulation checks.
Public/B2B disclosure policy must define allowed dashboard fields.
Abuse reporting, correction, and takedown workflow must exist.
Negative tests must prove dashboards cannot expose identity or raw source material.
Minimum source-count policy must exist before aggregate dashboard display.
Manipulation resistance policy must exist before dashboard responses.
Negative tests must prove dashboards cannot display single observations.
Negative tests must prove dashboards cannot suppress negative reviews.
Correction and takedown workflow must exist before dashboard display.
Aggregate privacy threshold and cell suppression policy must exist.
Favorability-neutral review presentation policy must exist.
Dashboard display contract must be accepted.
Negative tests must prove dashboard cannot display escrow artifacts.
Export and download policy must exist before dashboard delivery.
